sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Current magenta squares (excluding top bar one at [1,5]):
1. [[33, 14], [33, 15], [34, 15], [34, 14]] - top-left area
2. [[34, 38], [34, 39], [35, 39], [35, 38]] - top-right area
3. [[53, 44], [53, 45], [54, 45], [54, 44]] - bottom-right area
4. [[54, 13], [54, 14], [55, 14], [55, 13]] - bottom-left area
Blue blob: rows 23-31, cols 29-37 (center ~27, 33)
Each click moves a square up-left by 1 (row-1, col-1).
For square 2 at (34, 38): to reach row 29 (blob top), needs 5 clicks. Col would go from 38 to 33, which is within blob range. So 5 clicks.
For square 3 at (53, 44): to reach row 29, needs 24 clicks. Col would go from 44 to 20, which is outside blob range. Hmm.
Wait, maybe the squares don't need to reach the blob. Maybe they need to reach specific positions. Let me think about this differently.
Looking at the original dot positions:
- (37, 18) → square at (33, 14) after 4 moves
- (37, 41) → square at (34, 38) after 4 moves
- (54, 49) → square at (53, 44) after 4 moves (wait, this doesn't match)
- (55, 14) → square at (54, 13) after 4 moves
Actually, let me reconsider. The squares were placed at the dot positions, then moved. Original dot positions were:
- (37, 18) → square placed at [[36, 17], [36, 18], [37, 18], [37, 17]] (top-left of square)
- After 5 moves (1 initial + 4 more): [[33, 14], [33, 15], [34, 15], [34, 14]]
Hmm, the movement is: each click moves the top-left corner from (r, c) to (r-1, c-1).
Let me just keep clicking all 4 squares repeatedly until something interesting happens. I'll batch multiple rounds.

sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Current positions (top-left corner):
# Square A: (33, 14)
# Square B: (34, 38)
# Square C: (53, 44)
# Square D: (54, 13)
# Blue blob: rows 23-31, cols 29-37

# Let me batch several rounds of clicks. Each round moves all squares up-left by 1.
# I'll do 5 rounds (20 clicks) to get closer to the blob.

clicks = []
for round in range(5):
    # Square A: starts at (33-round, 14-round)
    # Square B: starts at (34-round, 38-round)
    # Square C: starts at (53-round, 44-round)
    # Square D: starts at (54-round, 13-round)
    clicks.append({'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33-round, 'col': 14-round})
    clicks.append({'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 34-round, 'col': 38-round})
    clicks.append({'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 53-round, 'col': 44-round})
    clicks.append({'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 54-round, 'col': 13-round})

action(clicks)
</parameter>
